underlying_goal: Iteratively develop and refine a FreqTrade trading strategy (LadderReversionStrategy) including entry logic, stoploss calculations, backtesting, analyzer UI, and data-driven architecture for entry conditions
friction_detail: Analyzer diverged from backtester results due to re-running strategy independently, stoploss logic required multiple fixes, and long entry conditions had a bug using the wrong column.
brief_summary: User iteratively refined a FreqTrade trading strategy across strategy logic, backtesting config, and analyzer UI over a very long session, achieving significant architectural improvements (data-driven entry conditions, HTF NaN guard) despite recurring bugs and still-poor backtest profitability.
